item.title: Visual Code cheatsheet
item.description: OPENING AND CLOSING SIDEBAR ctrl + b JUMP TO FILE EXPLORER ctrl + shift + e GO TO FILE ctrl + p JUMP TO TERMINAL ctrl + j
